personal.name: Hiruvinda Jayashanka
personal.tagline: I build beautiful, fast, and accessible digital experiences. Turning ideas into polished products.

paragraphs: I am a third-year Software Engineering student from SLIIT. And I have done number of projects focus on full stack development.

It is always exciting for me to learn a new technology and dive into solving problems that I have never solved before. Even when i am doing university projects i like develop features that allow me to interact and learn new things.

projects.title: MediCare
projects.description: An AI-enabled smart healthcare and telemedicine platform built on a microservices architecture. Supports doctor appointments, video consultations, AI symptom checking, and payments — fully containerized and cloud-ready.
projects.myRole: Built the Doctor Service and Telemedicine Service. Handled doctor registration, specialty management, and secure video session token generation using Agora RTC enabling real-time video consultations between doctors and patients.
projects.impact: Enabled the core clinical workflow, without the Doctor Service and Telemedicine Service, doctors couldn't be onboarded and patients couldn't have video consultations. Agora RTC integration brought real-time, low-latency video into a production microservices environment.

projects.title: MoneyMentor
projects.description: A gamified savings coach web app designed for low-income youth. Features financial tracking, XP-based leveling, achievement badges, a knowledge hub with quizzes, and an AI financial advisor powered by Gemini.
projects.myRole: Owned the Group & Chat module, built a real-time WebSocket chat system with JWT ticket auth, room management, soft-delete messaging, link previews, and badge sharing into group chats. Also handled unit and integration testing with Jest.
projects.impact: Gave the platform its social layer. The real-time group chat turned MoneyMentor from a solo tool into a community, members could share badges, celebrate milestones, and keep each other accountable.

projects.title: SafeCert
projects.description: A mobile safety training and certification platform for industrial workers. Supports multi-language content (English, Sinhala, Tamil), AI-powered quizzes, text-to-speech, GPS incident reporting, and verified digital certificates.
projects.myRole: Built the digital certification system, handling certificate generation with pdf-lib, secure storage via Cloudinary and Firebase, and multi-language certificate issuance when users complete a course.
projects.impact: Made course completion tangible. The certification system gave workers a verified, shareable proof of their training — the thing that makes the entire learning journey mean something in a real workplace.

projects.title: CeylonTrails
projects.description: A MERN stack travel companion platform where users can document, share, and discover travel experiences across Sri Lanka. Features interactive maps, post discovery, comments, and voting.
projects.myRole: Built the full authentication system - registration, login, JWT-based session management, profile management, and admin controls. Also developed the like/dislike and content engagement features.
projects.impact: Secured the entire platform. Auth was the gate every user passed through, and the like/dislike system drove the content ranking that determined what others discovered.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: My personal developer portfolio built with Next.js, Three.js, and Framer Motion. Features a 3D dot-matrix globe with Sri Lanka highlighted, glassmorphism aesthetics, scroll snapping, and a working contact form via EmailJS.
projects.myRole: Designed and built everything from scratch — the 3D globe, all section components, animations, and the contact API route.
projects.impact: A single place that represents who I am as a developer and how I think about building.
